ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition To Establish Heirship
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Continued To Aug-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-13-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion appeared by zoom for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The Court stated that it is impressed with the thoroughness of the search of the will and that it is satisfied that there is no will. Ms. Mannion stated that she is confident that they know all of the heirs, provided history, spoke of family member Martin Seligson initially taking this on and then needing the Public Administrators assistance, and stated that the Public Administrator got all of the information regarding the paternal side from Martin. Ms. Mannion also stated that the Public Administrator did their searches regarding the maternal heirs and that the Public Administrator will not turn off efforts to continue looking for family members. The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition. Status on close of estate is set for August 29, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court asked Ms. Mannion to conduct a search for heirs with a professional. Status on filing of a petition to establish heirship is set for February 14, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-26-2021 Continued To Aug-16-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
